commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
GOOGLE_SHEET_ID=your_google_sheet_id_or_full_url_here
GOOGLE_CREDENTIAL_PATH=credentials/service_account.json
# OR use base64-encoded credential:
# GOOGLE_CREDENTIAL_PATH_B64=base64_encoded_json_here
GOOGLE_WORKSHEET_NAME=Engagement Report
TIMEZONE=Asia/Jakarta
SCRAPER_STRATEGY=instaloader
# Required only if SCRAPER_STRATEGY=instaloader:
INSTAGRAM_USERNAME=your_instagram_username
INSTAGRAM_PASSWORD=your_instagram_password
# Optional tuning:
REQUEST_DELAY_SECONDS=3
MAX_RETRIES=3
CAPTION_PREVIEW_LENGTH=100
